output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel(COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q5711748 ; p:P1617 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1617 ?sales ; pq:P10611 ?certification .
  ?certification rdfs:label ?certificationLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?certificationLabel) = "en" && CONTAINS(LCASE(?certificationLabel) , "platinum"))
  ?album wdt:P50 ?artist .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?artistLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?artist ?artistLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

```sparql
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>

PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel(COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q5711748 ; p:P1617 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1617 ?sales ; pq:P10611 ?certification .
  ?certification rdfs:label ?certificationLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?certificationLabel) = "en" && CONTAINS(LCASE(?certificationLabel) , "platinum"))
  ?album wdt:P50 ?artist .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?artistLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?artist ?artistLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
```
